items.name: Crispy Calamari
items.description: Lightly battered and fried squid rings served with lemon aioli and marinara sauce

items.name: Burrata Caprese
items.description: Creamy burrata with heirloom tomatoes, fresh basil, aged balsamic reduction, and extra virgin olive oil

items.name: Garlic Prawn Bruschetta
items.description: Sautéed king prawns in garlic butter on toasted sourdough with cherry tomatoes and fresh herbs

items.name: Mushroom Arancini
items.description: Crispy risotto balls filled with wild mushroom and truffle, served with romesco sauce

items.name: Soup of the Day
items.description: Chef's daily selection. Please ask your server for today's soup. Served with artisan bread

items.name: 28-Day Aged Ribeye Steak
items.description: 10oz prime ribeye steak, cooked to your preference, served with hand-cut fries, roasted vine tomatoes, and peppercorn sauce

items.name: Pan-Seared Salmon
items.description: Atlantic salmon fillet with lemon butter sauce, seasonal vegetables, and crushed new potatoes

items.name: Truffle Mushroom Risotto
items.description: Slow-cooked Arborio rice with wild mushrooms, truffle oil, parmesan, and fresh thyme

items.name: Vegan Thai Green Curry
items.description: Fragrant coconut milk curry with tofu, seasonal vegetables, bamboo shoots, served with jasmine rice

items.name: Free-Range Chicken Supreme
items.description: Herb-marinated chicken breast with dauphinoise potatoes, fine beans, and tarragon jus

items.name: Lobster Linguine
items.description: Fresh linguine with half Boston lobster, cherry tomatoes, white wine, garlic, and fresh herbs

items.name: Lamb Shank
items.description: Slow-braised lamb shank with red wine jus, minted pea purée, roasted root vegetables, and rosemary mash

items.name: Chocolate Fondant
items.description: Warm dark chocolate fondant with molten center, served with vanilla ice cream and raspberry coulis

items.name: Crème Brûlée
items.description: Classic French vanilla custard with caramelized sugar crust, served with shortbread biscuit

items.name: Vegan Mango Sorbet
items.description: Three scoops of house-made mango sorbet with fresh tropical fruit salad

items.name: Kalai Signature Mojito
items.description: White rum, fresh lime, mint, elderflower, soda

items.description: Vodka, Kahlúa, freshly brewed espresso, vanilla syrup

items.name: Passion Fruit Daiquiri

items.name: Virgin Mojito

items.name: Tuesday Tasting Menu
items.description: 3 courses — choose one starter, one main, and one dessert from a curated selection. Available every Tuesday.

items.name: Weekend Brunch
items.description: Two courses from our brunch menu. Bottomless Prosecco or mimosas add-on available for $20 per person (90-minute limit).

items.name: Business Lunch
items.description: 2 courses with still/sparkling water and coffee included. Quick service guaranteed within 60 minutes.
